title: Fix rand_mode(0) on sub-object members not preventing solver write-back
body:
## Summary

This patch fixes `rand_mode(0)` on nested sub-object members having no effect.
When a class has `rand InnerClass nested;` and `nested.val1.rand_mode(0)` is called,
the solver still overwrites `val1` after `randomize()`. The root cause is that
`write_var` for globalConstrained sub-object members was always registered
unconditionally, and the solver write-back had no way to check the sub-object's
`__Vrandmode` state.

Discovered while running core-v-verif UVM testbench on Verilator
(https://github.com/openhwgroup/core-v-verif/pull/2724).

Additionally includes a defensive fix in `V3LinkDot.cpp` to prevent `findSymPrefixed`
from overwriting a correctly linked class `randomize()` with `std::randomize`.

## Reproducer

```systemverilog
class Inner;
  rand bit [7:0] val;
  constraint c { val inside {[8'd10:8'd50]}; }
  function new(); val = 0; endfunction
endclass

class Outer;
  rand Inner nested;
  rand bit [7:0] top_val;
  constraint c { top_val inside {[8'd1:8'd20]}; }
  function new(); nested = new(); top_val = 0; endfunction
endclass

module t;
  initial begin
    Outer obj = new;
    void'(obj.nested.val.rand_mode(0));
    obj.nested.val = 42;
    if (!obj.randomize()) $stop;
    if (obj.nested.val != 42) $stop;  // FAILS on master: val overwritten
    $write("*-* All Finished *-*\n");
    $finish;
  end
endmodule
```

On master, `val` is overwritten by the solver (e.g. `val=31`) despite `rand_mode(0)`:

```
%Error: t_randomize_randmode_subobj.v:65:  got=31 exp=42
```

## Changes

- `src/V3Randomize.cpp` (ConstraintExprVisitor): For globalConstrained sub-object
  members with `usesMode`, wrap the `write_var` call in an `AstIf` that checks
  the sub-object's `__Vrandmode.at(index)`. When rand_mode is off, call
  `unregister_var` to remove the variable from the solver so it is not written back.
- `src/V3Randomize.cpp` (createRandomizeClassVars): Extend parent `__Vrandmode`
  array to account for rand_mode indices from globalConstrained sub-objects.
- `src/V3AstAttr.h`: Add `RANDOMIZER_UNREGISTER_VAR` enum entry.
- `include/verilated_random.h`: Add `unregister_var()` method to remove a
  previously registered variable from the solver.
- `src/V3LinkDot.cpp`: Add `return` after linking class `randomize()` to prevent
  `findSymPrefixed` from falling through and overwriting `classOrPackagep` with
  `std::randomize`.

## Test

- Added `test_regress/t/t_randomize_randmode_subobj.{v,py}` -- Tests rand_mode(0)
  on individual nested sub-object members: disable, verify value held, disable
  second member, re-enable both and verify randomization resumes.

---
Developed by PlanV GmbH, assisted with Claude Code.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
